## What's Changed

- Added server-side start offsets for transcoded Local media streams so Tater Tube TV Mode can tune into the correct timeline position instead of restarting from the beginning.
- Local media catalog items now advertise whether seeking should happen in the player or on the server.
- Added tests for FFmpeg transcode seek arguments and Local media seek metadata.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

For local media transcoding, keep the same `/config`, media folder, and hardware device mappings you already use.
